hypothesis: The pinned Ternip source can elaborate as a reduced D=64 core with open-source tools before any YPCB wrapper or DDR integration is attempted.

commands.failure: custom yosys-0.64 dependency failed before Ternip RTL parsing: genericBuild: command not found

blocker.message: yosys-0.64 default builder fails with genericBuild: command not found

decision.next_gate: Decouple reduced Ternip RTL gate from the broken custom-Yosys path, preferably with a Verilator lint/elaboration target or a fixed packaged yosys-slang/Yosys pair.
decision.do_not_do_next: Do not create a YPCB Ternip bitstream or token-rate claim before reduced RTL elaboration succeeds.
